title: viola subatlantica
intro: Viola subatlantica, also known as Atlantic pimpernel, is a perennial plant species in the violet family (Violaceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Viola subatlantica is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be found in some skincare products due to its purported benefits for skin health.
